turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, can you help me schedule something with a physiotherapist? My lower back is giving me a lot of trouble, like for the past two weeks.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course! We have Mr. Rajan Naik as our senior physiotherapist. He has slots this week on Tuesday and Thursday evenings around 5 PM.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Let's go with Tuesday. I'm Madhav Tambe, number is 9890123456.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Booked! Madhav Tambe with Mr. Rajan Naik, this Tuesday at 5 PM. Please wear comfortable, loose clothing. Is there anything specific I should note about your condition?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Just that it's lower back, and I sit at a desk all day. That's probably the cause.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'll add that note. See you Tuesday, Mr. Tambe. Hope you get some relief soon!
